rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §30.086 governs agency contracting and operations for deaf education services; it has no operative dependency on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The agency shall contract with any qualified organization or individual for diagnostic, evaluative, or instructional services or any other services relating to the education of students who are deaf or hard of hearing
_note: No textual or fiscal linkage between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute.
